text: Welcome to the community, helper_alex! You’re approved as moderator. Please review the community guidelines and mod handbook before jumping in.
Welcome to the community, guide_sam! You’re approved as event_helper. Glad to have you on board—please check the event coordination notes when you get a chance.
Welcome to the community, mentor_lina! You’re approved as mentor. Thanks for joining—please take a look at the mentorship guidelines when you settle in.
